raw_consumer_statement: I disputed a {$64.00} charge ( XXXX XXXX  ) on XX/XX/year>. The merchant already charged my cleaning in full ( {$79.00} ) that day ( receipt shows {$0.00} balance ) and had separately charged {$20.00} for a XXXX XXXX the day before. The {$64.00} is a post-transaction membership charge I did not clearly consent to. Under 12 C.F.R. 1026.13 ( Reg Z ), this is a billing error ( not as agreed/unauthorized ). My issuer ( Citi ) closed the dispute on XX/XX/year>XXXX  as Customer Responsible. I request CFPB require issuer compliance with Reg Z error-resolution, including provisional credit during reinvestigation, and require Citi to obtain and share any affirmative consent record if it exists. Evidence attached : receipt ( showing {$79.00} and {$0.00} balance with 3 voucher hours ), statement entries for {$20.00} voucher and {$64.00} membership, and screenshots of the small-print onboarding.
